title: Desktop app (Phase 1)
detail: Tauri v2 app: Personal Space tab bound live to ~/.claude with real-time file watching, galaxy sky with random comets/asteroids, in-app CodeMirror editor, delete-with-confirm apple fall, tray, deep links, auto-updater. Galaxy tab teaser.

title: Monorepo + auto-deployed site (Phase 0)
detail: pnpm workspace, packages/core schemas, inventory generator, Astro marketing/download site auto-deployed to Pages on every push, session-logger now writes activity/changelog.jsonl.

title: Capability pack
detail: Deep links (#item=...), keyboard shortcuts (/, Esc, P), copy-to-clipboard, changelog filters, tokens sparkline, tree level. Mobile: tap-outside hides the sheet.

title: File viewer & downloads
detail: View full skill/agent files and download them from the tree; toolkit .zip button; mobile scroll & tap fixes.

title: Impact pack added
detail: prd-writer & web-perf skills, security-auditor & docs-writer agents, /standup & /new-feature commands, fruit search on the tree.

title: Toolkit created
detail: 8 skills, 7 agents, 3 hooks, 3 commands installed; 3D dashboard launched.

title: Token discipline active
detail: Grep-before-read, edit-over-write, subagent delegation rules enabled in CLAUDE.md.
